programme.desc: On a special birthday themed episode, Food Factory serves up birthday cake ice cream, edible waffle bowls, mountains of cotton candy, and a giant chocolate piñata.

programme.title: Asia S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: In Asia, the most densely populated continent, animals have developed extraordinary ways to seize the opportunities of the human world. From tigers entering a city to hunt easy prey, to elephants stopping traffic to demand food from motorists. A small park in central Bangkok supports three hundred giant lizards, whilst a flying squirrel in Taipei has made a cosy home in a school.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Spice Trail Adventure S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Joanna returns to her birthplace, India, in search of a kitchen cupboard staple once known as 'black gold'. Starting in the majestic ancient city of Hampi, she's invited to a dazzling Hindu festival by a local rock climber. Onwards to the lush backwaters of Kerala where she meets a great grandmother who teaches the oldest martial art in the world and spends the night in a magical houseboat inspired by the old spice traders.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S05 - EP 13
programme.desc: In Canada, there's nowhere to go as homes are washed down river. An ice skater is on thin ice in New Jersey and a cliff edge in Brazil collapses after heavy rain.

A small park in central Bangkok supports three hundred giant lizards, whilst a flying squirrel in Taipei has made a cosy home in a school.

programme.title: Croc Watch with Steve Backshall S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Steve tries to find out if monster crocodiles can still thrive in the Reserve, and encounters five-metre-long Henry. But will he finally find the monster croc he's been searching for?

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in Sri Lanka S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Alexander heads for the paradise isle of the Indian Ocean, discovering its golden sands and historic culture, visiting the fortress town of Galle, a mask making factory and an elephant sanctuary.

programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness learns how a factory in Wrexham produces 120 million boxes of breakfast cereal every year.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Spice Trail Adventure S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Joanna returns to her birthplace, India, in search of a kitchen cupboard staple once known as 'black gold'. Starting in the majestic ancient city of Hampi, she's invited to a dazzling Hindu festival by a local rock climber. Onwards to the lush backwaters of Kerala where she meets a great grandmother who teaches the oldest martial art in the world and spends the night in a magical houseboat inspired by the old spice traders.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan turn their attention to the great outdoors as they aim to tackle the garden. The overgrown patch of land on the side of the mountain has been untouched for more than a decade, and with no idea of what plants thrive in the Tuscan terrain, the best pals seek help from gardening oracle Warrie Price, who has spent over 30 years cultivating a 15-acre oasis.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city Florence, he's determined to have a mural, but Amanda fears his creative juices could turn into a flood. To nail his aesthetic, Alan travels to the outskirts of the Tuscan capital to meet Jane at her medieval home decorated in rare 14th-century frescos.

programme.title: Grand Designs S22 - EP 2
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire, high-flyers Zara and Giuliano set out to build a 400-square-metre malthouse-inspired home, but run into problems from the get-go.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Jamie gets frugal with leftovers as he makes spaghetti frittata, rustles up pork pies in the air fryer and whips up thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Finishing the series in the concrete jungle, Zuu and AJ check out how the 1%ers of New York splash their cash. Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place. They end their time in the Big Apple by serving up food for the suits on Wall Street from a pizza van.

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain shows us how to create the perfect dishes to compliment any kind of day.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Food Stories S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: In the West Country, Rick meets an organic food pioneer, Britain's most famous female cheese maker, and chef Mark Hix, the master of simple British food. Then, he cooks his own vegetarian dishes.

programme.title: Grand Indian Hotel S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: In the romantic city of Udaipur, the devoted staff prepare for a secret marriage proposal. And some VIP guests receive a royal welcome. Documentary series about the most exclusive chain of hotels in India, the Oberoi.

programme.title: Jamie's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: This time, Jamie's dressing a salad in a way you've never seen before... with a crown of cheese! He's got a speedy, tasty twist on your Sunday roast that keeps it all in one pan; and puts store-cupboard essentials centre stage in two fabulous family meals that are made in minutes. Finally, YouTube sensation Alex Aïnouz shares his fabulous 5-ingredient take on a French classic.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S04 - EP 4
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel to Copenhagen to work at Nimb Hotel in the historic Tivoli Gardens. Giles learns to be the brake man on one of the world's oldest wooden rollercoasters, while Monica changes lightbulbs on the ornate Moroccan inspired facade and dives to clean an vast tropical aquarium. Giles learns how to get a table at one of the city's most avant-garde restaurants, and Monica dresses in horror makeup to give Giles the pleasure of being terrified.

programme.title: Hemsley + Hemsley - Healthy and Delicious S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Healthy home cooks Jasmine and Melissa Hemsley create nutrient rich dishes that will warm you up on a cold day. From a buckwheat porridge with coconut to their signature health giving bone broth, the girls offer nutritionally high alternatives to the carbs we're often drawn to when it's chilly outside. A stunning slow cook chicken curry is topped with cauliflower rice for a warming supper and for pudding, a intriguing spicy ground almond apple crumble.

programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make bacalao con pomodoro, a dish inspired by an amazing meal she shared with husband John during a special trip to Elba, a Mediterranean island in Tuscany.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 10
programme.desc: Buddha Jumps Over the Wall is a classic stew in the Mandarin-speaking world. Learn more about the cultural significance of Buddha Jumps Over the Wall in Taiwan and all the culinary techniques involved.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 49
programme.desc: With Curtis Stone's help, our three Semi-Finalists serve a three-course menu for 20 diners and judges, competing for a place in the Grand Finale.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Denise has a growth on her booty, but scarring from a previous trauma has kept her from getting it removed. Zachary is a drag artist whose touring career is dragged down by his debilitating psoriasis.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 9
programme.desc: Be it savoury or sweet, Taro is one of the key ingredients that characterises Taiwanese cuisine. Learn more about how this classic Taiwanese dish honours the tradition and terroir.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Old Flames, New Fire
programme.desc: When her father, Michael Luck, becomes a person of interest in the death of his ex-business partner, Lisa must do whatever she can to help. This means she will need to enlist the aid of her mother, Gabbi.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: When Michael, an older single man looking for companionship, falls for alluring psychic Janis, she sees him as an easy mark. But will Janis be exposed by Virginia, Michael's concerned relative?

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: Today's first up is the "Self-Renewal House," a 40-year-old apartment beautifully transformed! Next, we'll introduce the "Co-Living House," a new concept in housing that's becoming increasingly popular!

programme.title: Airline Wars - EP 3
programme.desc: A cancelled flight to a dream vacation sends a mother over the edge. A pilot has no choice but to restrain an allegedly intoxicated man. Reports of gunshots at JFK causes complete pandemonium.

programme.title: Airline Wars - EP 4
programme.desc: A combative passenger responds with punches when asked to follow FAA regulations. When air marshals attempt to remove a man from the wing of a stationary aircraft, he plummets to the ground.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays - EP 5
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to prepare a meat-free holiday meal that everyone will love! First, she makes a flavourful soup using Italian pumpkins. Next, she prepares her family's traditional "Holiday Stars".

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays - EP 6
programme.desc: Inspired by her friend Brian, Rachael shows how to make her version of a beef and chorizo chilli with queso that is the perfect meal for a holiday crowd, a big-match night or a family dinner.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 50
programme.desc: Our two Grand Finalists go head-to-head over two rounds to see who will be crowned the winner of MasterChef Australia 2024!

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 1
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: Casting 1147km - EP 2
programme.desc: The first mission begins: the actors must create their own characters and dialogue to portray the beginning of a romance. Judging the audition are acclaimed director Yoon Jong-ho and writer Kim Jae-hwan.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Even within a family, everyone needs their own space, and the homes you'll see today capture the essence of "Together, Yet Apart". Let's explore an open house in Bundang and a forest-view home in Yongin.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: Casting 1147km - EP 2
programme.desc: The first mission begins: the actors must create their own characters and dialogue to portray the beginning of a romance. Judging the audition are acclaimed director Yoon Jong-ho and writer Kim Jae-hwan.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Bryan has a genetic condition that may be causing the huge mystery bumps on his head. Chalamar cannot dress how she wants because of her ugly chest bump, which she dubs "a turd".

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13) - EP 10
programme.desc: Chefs split into two teams to prepare a lunch for over 100 kids at Dodger Stadium, and the chef with immunity gets to choose one member from each team who must swap sides and work with the other regions.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: When Michael, an older single man looking for companionship, falls for alluring psychic Janis, she sees him as an easy mark. But will Janis be exposed by Virginia, Michael's concerned relative?

programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 4
programme.desc: James and his team partner with brother-sister newbie flippers Blake and Abby on a risky zombie house project. James funds the renovation, while the siblings manage the contractors and oversee the work.

programme.title: Casting 1147km - EP 1
programme.desc: Six charismatic rookie actors gather under one roof for a groundbreaking residency audition. Age, experience and style all differ, but they share one goal: to become the male lead of a romantic drama.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: A powerful story of a mother and daughter who are held captive in their own home, and whose love and wits help them survive the impossible. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: Chef Deborah creates a flavourful party menu featuring zupa ogórkowa, a Polish dill pickle chowder, and Kansas City-style barbecue salmon with biscuits. She smokes the salmon, then prepares a pickle soup.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 19
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 20
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen for a cooking challenge. Both Rachael and Sara create mystery meals using ingredients from Rachael's Tuscan pantry.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13) - EP 1
programme.desc: Season 13 celebrates the "United Tastes of America," bringing together chefs from four regions of the country: the Northeast, the Midwest, the West and the South.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13) - EP 2
programme.desc: The auditions continue as chefs from the Midwest battle it out for a coveted spot in the top 20. Each contestant has 45 minutes to prepare a signature dish that will impress the judges.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 2
programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 18

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 5
programme.desc: James and his team connect with Tyler, an aspiring flipper with a lead on a zombie house. But entrusting such a big job to a partner with little experience makes them question whether he can do it.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something - EP 6
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.desc: Discord fills the Stephens home when Endora makes Tabitha sound like a musical genius.

programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator, the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive.

programme.title: Mission Impossible S4 - EP 24
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief.

programme.title: Mission Impossible S4 - EP 25
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler.

programme.desc: Niles' Halloween costume party becomes a comedy of errors when he mistakenly thinks that Daphne is pregnant -- and Frasier's the father.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: Founder Effect
programme.desc: From a failed Olympic bid in Hamburg to a Harvard athlete’s struggle with overtraining, Founder Effect follows the stories behind HYROX and WHOOP - two founder-led companies that transformed personal setbacks into global businesses reshaping fitness, sport and health.

programme.title: CNBC Explains - EP 8
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains’ is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: CNBC Sports - PGA TOUR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: Desafio Ruta 40
programme.desc: Following its successful debut in 2022, the World Rally-Raid Championship (W2RC) brings together the unique characteristics of this discipline, which combines extreme endurance and the technical skill of the drivers and crews.

programme.title: CNBC Sports
programme.desc: The Santa Eulària Ibiza Marathon returns, as the island of Ibiza’s most popular sporting event is back to celebrate its 10th anniversary.

programme.title: CNBC Sports
programme.desc: For over 16 years, the Ras Al Khaimah Half Marathon has continued to grow its stature as the number one Half Marathon in the Middle East. The likes of legendary names such as Sammy Wanjiru, Hellen Obiri, Peres Jepchirchir and Benard Koech have all enjoyed creating headlines in Ras Al Khaimah.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery (R)

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: Hello! NHK WORLD-JAPAN (R)
programme.desc: Showcasing various programs and activities of NHK WORLD-JAPAN which provides the latest information on Japan and Asia to the global audience.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 54 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: BS Special "The Light of Hope: Asian University for Women" (R)
programme.desc: Asian University for Women, founded in Bangladesh in 2008, welcomes talented students from countries where women face deep inequality and seeks to cultivate future female leaders. Women from 20 Asian nations study here, including those who secretly fled Afghanistan and Rohingya refugees pursuing knowledge for their communities, all striving to build a new future despite discrimination and poverty.

programme.title: Saturday Drama "The Three Stars of Mushoran" Ep. 3 (R)
programme.desc: Ginbayashi Yoko (Koike Eiko), a world-class chef, loses everything when her restaurant’s owner vanishes with the profits. Now supporting two children, she takes a job as a prison nutritionist, where her inventive meals begin to win over inmates. But when a former inmate is arrested again, Yoko is forced to confront a difficult question: Can people truly change? A new quest begins - earning three "Musholan" stars behind bars.

programme.title: The 49th Creative TV Drama Award-winning Drama "One Day, My Wife's Panties"(R)
programme.desc: The Creative TV Drama Award, jointly hosted by the Television and Radio Writers’ Association and NHK, presents its 49th Grand Prize winner -selected from 1,056 entries-now brought to life. Namiki Sota (Kura Yuki), who struggles to fit into society, becomes obsessed after accidentally losing his wife’s panties in a river. Later that stormy night, he rushes to retrieve them, causing a public commotion.

programme.title: Natural Grandeur of the East Mini
no art, no life
programme.desc: Self-taught artists are gaining respect globally. In Japan, such artists are making career-defining works, but few art fans or curators know them.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 117
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 55 (R)

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 17
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 19
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2827
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.desc: Teenagers are keen on trends. Stepping into the era of technology, they are particularly interested in emerging electronic products and popular media. Our hosts collect the newest information from all over the world, sharing their discoveries with viewers each week.

programme.title: Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4
programme.desc: The fourth season of this popular cross-regional music talent contest designed for adults aged 35 and above expands global recruitment, welcoming contestants from Hong Kong, Macao, mainland China, North America, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia.

programme.title: Star Weekly
programme.desc: Star Weekly invites celebrities and well-known figures from different sectors to chat with our hosts, sharing their latest work plans and discussing special topics related to films, television and concerts, focusing especially on people and events that online users are keenly following.

programme.title: Gourmet Express Weekly
programme.desc: Our food anchors and hosts stay up-to-date with the latest culinary trends, gathering information on top-rated restaurants from various platforms. The hosts personally sample the food and provide honest reviews to keep you informed about delicious and affordable dining options.

programme.title: Clash Of Chefs
programme.desc: When "Master Ding" Li Jiading and "Third Sister" Xiao Xiuxiang meet, a kitchen battle is about to begin! Each episode features guests who present challenges to Master Ding and Third Sister, requiring them to use the same ingredients or themes to create dishes with distinct styles.

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: Teenagers are keen on trends. Stepping into the era of technology, they are particularly interested in emerging electronic products and popular media. Our hosts collect the newest information from all over the world, sharing their discoveries with viewers each week.

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Life in Hong Kong is vibrant and diverse. This lifestyle show combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.

programme.title: News At 18:30
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: News Magazine 2026 & Yes, Boss.
programme.desc: A weekly programme covering notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors to discuss and analyse the underlying causes and developments.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Hong Kong: Never Too Small
programme.desc: Our host leads viewers to visit both time-honoured and modern shops across four key areas of daily life: clothing, food, housing and transportation. He reveals the shops' operating history, using them to showcase the enduring beauty of "small spaces."

programme.title: Music Money Monster
programme.desc: Music Money Monster challenges ordinary people and celebrities to battle through live singing stages judged solely by a real‑time AI pitch and beat analyzer, turning flawless intonation into instant cash rewards for players and viewers!

programme.title: J Music 2026
programme.desc: In each episode, popular singers are invited as guests, and they select their favourite works, performing with the live band to share their music with fans.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone Again & You Are Not Alone in A.I.
programme.desc: Host Spencer Leung returns with a new series of this supernatural-themed show, featuring guests who share real ghost stories and reveal hidden rituals and spiritual secrets, while bringing viewers live interactions filled with both chills and surprises.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 449

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 19
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 20
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin tracks down Shek Wai’s old love Chiu Lai, who tells him a mysterious guy visited Shek Wai’s home recently. Chiu-kwan decides to sue Yeung-tin with the aim of revoking the trust. Ko Sham slyly makes the top legal counsels in the city refuse to represent Chiu-kwan. Siu-chuen questions Ko Sham about this.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen is unhappy about the prospect of Lam Ching becoming vice chairman, so she takes her to some road on the hill where she slaps and insults her. Family members react strongly to Yeung-tin’s decision to promote Lam Ching, and Wun-chau dissuades them.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 13
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Faced with the unanimous opposition of the directors, Yeung-tin boldly puts forward a proposal. He threatens to resign if Lam Ching’s appointment is not approved. As soon as the meeting is concluded, Wai-leung and his chums covertly tell the media about the inside story of the Fongs’ mother and son legal battle, causing Fong International share price to go south.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin collapses. Lam Ching hosts the press conference by herself and declares she won’t resign as trust executor. programme.title: The Scarecrow - EP 1
programme.desc: Kang Tae Ju (Park Hae Soo), a former ace detective demoted to his hometown of Gangseong. He sees a serial murder case as an opportunity to restore his reputation, but clashes with prosecutor Cha Si Young (Lee Hee Joon), a bitter rival from his school days.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 10
programme.desc: Kim Eun invites Ho-young for a family dinner at her home. At her wits’ end, Prosecutor Kang reveals the truth to Ji-young. Can Pan-ho stop Ho-young in time, before it is too late?

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: The Scarecrow - EP 2
programme.desc: Kang Tae Ju (Park Hae Soo), a former ace detective demoted to his hometown of Gangseong. He sees a serial murder case as an opportunity to restore his reputation, but clashes with prosecutor Cha Si Young (Lee Hee Joon), a bitter rival from his school days.

programme.title: Mother and Mom - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The drama depicts the 'worrying' Daechi-dong life of three generations of women, centered on a passionate working mom Jung Eun (Jeon Hye Jin) and her daughter, as they prepare for the entrance test to enter a famous English academy.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 11
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 7
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 19
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 22
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared. He not only manages to solve this crisis, but also turns the tables, exposing the secret of ROYAL NOBLE CONSORT (Selena Lee), making JIAQING caught in the crossfire!

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 21
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 22
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 1
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 13
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 17
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape. The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA).

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 24
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 25
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: Wonder Women - EP 5
programme.desc: LAM FEI (Miriam Yeung) is a beautiful, trendy yet cheerful “Wonder Women” housewife. She and her husband, an architect SHEUNG KIM-HUNG (Raymond Wong) and a smart and active son SHEUNG KAI-KAI are living a happy life. LAM FEI has two buddies, a career woman, MAN FUNG-WAH (Alice Chan) and a pretty and wealthy wife MA SEE-LUI (Rebecca Zhu). Each of this trio has her own ideas about romance and encounter different up and down of love

programme.title: Wonder Women - EP 6
programme.desc: LAM FEI (Miriam Yeung) is a beautiful, trendy yet cheerful “Wonder Women” housewife. She and her husband, an architect SHEUNG KIM-HUNG (Raymond Wong) and a smart and active son SHEUNG KAI-KAI are living a happy life. LAM FEI has two buddies, a career woman, MAN FUNG-WAH (Alice Chan) and a pretty and wealthy wife MA SEE-LUI (Rebecca Zhu). Each of this trio has her own ideas about romance and encounter different up and down of love

programme.title: The Illegal Immigrant
programme.desc: This is a gritty and realistic Chinatown tale about the life of a Chinese illegal immigrant and his journey in New York. He is looking for a fake marriage with a girl so as to gain the right of abode there. Despite all the hardships and misfortunes, he tries to cope with life and reach for his dreams.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey2-Cinderella
programme.desc: Following the chaos unleashed by Pandora's Box, Joker is thrust through time and begins to awaken as the Monkey King, Sun Wukong. Torn between mortal emotions and divine destiny, he struggles to reconcile his love for Zixia Fairy with the responsibilities of his past.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter -the sole witness- mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong's Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: In this action fantasy movie based on the Chinese legend of the White Snake, a young herbalist falls in love with a thousand-year-old white snake disguised as a woman. When the white snake's true identity is revealed, a sorcerer goes to battle believing that in doing so, he is restoring balance and order between man and the supernatural.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika's mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn...

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its "Cop Shop Babes" as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat - can they resolve the case?

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao's enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei's concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: An old lady died after mysteriously falling off a building and her ghost appears to haunt the place. This freaked out the security guards, who invite ghostbuster Leo and his female assistant to help. In the process, Leo finds out that the old lady was killed by her son and daughter in law. To rest her soul, Leo promises to bring the couple to justice.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Falsely accused of murder, Ming Dynasty Imperial Guard Ying is pursued by his three sworn brothers until a fierce battle leaves all four entombed in ice. Four hundred years later, they awaken in modern Hong Kong, where they must reignite their ancient feud in a world they can barely recognise.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: A rich man dies, leaving all his fortune to his daughter in his will, but his son and nephew want a piece of the pie. The nephew sends Vincent to steal the will and the son finds Fung, who looks like his sister, to get the will. Vincent plans to marry Fung for the fortune, but as the two fall in love, they decide to unveil the cunning schemes.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle...

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building - only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Lang is assigned to befriend former triad boss Fei in order to investigate a diamond heist masterminded by the ruthless gangster Big Mad. When the deal goes awry and the diamonds end up in Fei's possession, Big Mad comes after them with a vengeance, forcing Lang and Fei to join forces as an unlikely bond begins to form between them.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao's spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll's eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women's Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei's father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey1-Pandora's box
programme.desc: Joker, a carefree bandit leader, learns he is the reincarnation of the Monkey King. As demons and immortals close in, he is drawn into a chaotic, time-bending journey with the mystical Pandora's Box. Caught between past and present, he must choose between destiny and freedom.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. Shi, a secondary PE teacher, accidentally takes a "super pill" invented by the science teacher and gains superpower, turning into Mr. B. He uses his superpower to help the school sports team win the championship and prevent crimes. When the triad is made aware of Mr. B's superpower, they try to gain the super pill for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: An illegitimate daughter of a businessman gets three wishes from a genie, Bo. However, Bo's magical power is far from perfect, leading to much hilarity in this charming fantasy comedy.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So was born a nobleman but is relegated to a beggar after being caught cheating. He becomes the chief of the Beggar's gang when he saves the gang's elder. One day, So foils an assassination attempt on the Emperor and is allowed to reinstate his status but he declines. He is then rewarded with an imperial beggar bowl and lives happily ever after.

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Hong Kong Hong Kong
programme.desc: After moving to Hong Kong, illegal immigrant Mang has no choice but to live in cramped quarters with male migrants who abuse her. In order to attain Hong Kong residency and a better life, she agrees to marry a lonely old carpenter. After her marriage, Mang crosses paths again with her ex-lover, and the two develop a passionate affair...

programme.title: Fight Back to School II
programme.desc: Following his demotion, officer Sing resigns from the police force and goes undercover at an international school to privately investigate a terrorist plot. There, he discovers bumbling detective Tat posing as a teacher. Forced into an alliance, they team up to confront the heavily armed criminals behind the plot in a chaotic showdown.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Directed by the acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar Wai, this epic action feature begins in Foshan when Ip Man, the martial arts master from the south, takes up a challenge by ageing northern master Gong Yu Tian. Ip Man wins the fight, but is then defeated by Gong Yu Tian's daughter Gong Er, with whom he forms an emotional bond...

programme.title: The Eunuch
programme.desc: A year before Lo Wei directed Bruce Lee in Fist Of Fury, he wrote and co-starred in this tale of a treacherous devil who wants nothing less than supreme power...and doesn't care if he has to murder the Emperor and use his own daughter as a deadly dupe to get it.

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: Zhang and Jin's daughter, Peony, are betrothed at birth but Jin objects to the engagement now. Zhang meets a carp spirit that looks exactly like Peony and they fall in love. When Justice Bao is asked by Jin to distinguish Peony from her replica, he decides to quit the case when he witness the true love between Zhang and the carp spirit.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: On his way back to the midlands, Guo Jing meets Huang Rong and they quickly fall in love. However, Ouyang Ke proposes to marry Huang Rong at the same time, so Huang's father sets up a duel for the two men to compete for her hand. Guo Jing finally beats Ouyang Ke to win Huang Rong back.

programme.title: The Happy Trio
programme.desc: Ah Chiao, a village girl stranded in the city, befriends a kind-hearted tramp and a retired actor. They are poor but happy, though Ah Chiao's fortune change for the better when she becomes a singer. However, she soon learns that money cannot buy one happiness...

programme.title: Pursuit of Vengeance
programme.desc: Kung Fu legend Ti Lung stars in the action movie as Fu Xue Hong, embarking on a epic journey of revenge for his father.

programme.title: The Adulteress
programme.desc: The film is about the drugged, then disgraced wife of a peddler in the waning days of the Ching Dynasty. To make matters worse, she's soon framed for her husband's murder by her rapist, the son of the local magistrate! And even that is not the end of her woes in this emotional suspense…

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan is a wealthy Kwangtung brat with a good kung fu background, he has only one ambition: to pit his wits against three shady masters of the North. The first, conman Che Tsai. The second, a professional romantic dubbed The Terrific. Terrific introduces Tou Kuan to his third rival, Thief Shih San-shou.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: The story is based on a famous Chinese opera. A young impoverished scholar, Zhang, is enchanted by Hong, the daughter of an influential family whom he meets in a temple. The young couple faces the threat of separation due to her family's objection, so Hong's maid secretly helps to arrange their rendezvous in the West Chamber!

programme.title: All Men are Brothers
programme.desc: This is a sequel to Chang Cheh's epic "The Water Margin", and follows the patriotic story of seven warriors in the band of 108 outlaws at Mount Liang. The magnificent seven battle against the despotic government officials to save their country.

programme.title: Sons Of Good Earth
programme.desc: This is an epic tale set during the time of the Sino-Japanese war. A painter Yu saves a young girl, Lotus, who is being sold to a brothel. They fall in love, get married and settled in to a peaceful life. However, their life is soon shattered by the Japanese invasion and the brutal regime that follows...

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing and Huang Rong raise the son of his sworn brother Yang Kang and named him Yang Guo. To prevent Yang Guo from taking revenge for his father's death, Huang Rong bans him from learning martial arts. Yang Guo runs away from home in anger and encounters Ouyang Feng, who teaches him the "Toad Stance" and accidentally unveils his true identity…

programme.title: Disco Bumpkins
programme.desc: This musical comedy is about how a young man Fen, along with his buddy Hamburger, finds love and success in the advertising world.

programme.title: Judgement of an Assassin
programme.desc: An evil clan plans a discord so as to dominate the martial arts world. Their masked assassins massacre another clan and one of the assassins is arrested and brought to trial at a tribunal of all the clans. What judgement will they make and can they uncover the truth?

programme.title: Hong Kong 73
programme.desc: In 1973, the Hong Kong Heng Seng Index hit extraordinary peaks and people from all walks of life go stock market crazy. Meanwhile, Hong Kong's social problems build up without anyone paying attention to what are actually happening to the crazy lives of people, in this mad city that many call home...

programme.title: Murderer Pursues
programme.desc: Wang Chung was a valued actor long before he became a director, but as a filmmaker, he helped create some of the most interesting thrillers Shaw Brothers ever released - including this fascinating crime saga of a Sino-Vietnamese crime gang. Danny Lee stars as a misunderstood refugee while Ray Lui plays a cop struggling against his own conscience to ensure that justice is upheld.

programme.title: Hex
programme.desc: This supernatural mystery tells the story of a sickly wife and her maid conspiring to kill her beastly husband, leading to a string of events with spooky twists and turns.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Mrs Lin's husband and his friend both have affairs with a belly dancer Sasa, and are both blackmailed by her. Sasa is stabbed one day and her brother shows up asking for money. A mysterious man also claims he can offer evidence for cash to help Lin's husband. Lin has to unveil the deceit, double-crosses and blackmailing before she is in danger too!

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Guitar-playing rich kid, Yang Fan, heads to Japan to join a rock 'n' roll band where he soon finds himself competing for the affections of two beautiful girls.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Mulan disguises herself as a male soldier to replace her aged father in a war against the barbarians. Her courage brings her victory in battles and she was promoted to a general. When Mulan returns home with glory, the chief commander asks her to marry his daughter, forcing Mulan to reveal her true identity.

programme.title: The Bride from Hell
programme.desc: Fang Ming marries the mysterious young lady Leng Qiu Ping, only to discover she is a spirit forced to drain men's life essence. With a Taoist's help, he frees her from an evil force, but their love cannot cross life and death, and they part at dawn in a bittersweet farewell.

programme.title: The Fighting Fool
programme.desc: Famous Kung Fu Pole master Red Eagle, is kidnapped by a villain one day. His disciple Meng, vows to rescue him. On his way, Meng encounters a greedy but great martial artist who agrees to join him in the rescue. Even though the two have extremely different personalities, they manage to team up and fight the villain in a final showdown.

programme.title: My Dream Boat
programme.desc: This is a story about the complicated love relationships between a group of young friends who are entangled in a web of love and emotions.

programme.title: The Killer Has No Return
programme.desc: Professional killer Lui goes to Malaysia after completing his mission of killing the big boss of a Hong Kong gang. His next target is a groom who is throwing his wedding banquet at a hotel in Chinatown. Just when Lui takes aim at his target, another victim instead of the groom is shot, and he becomes a scapegoat in this mystery assassination.

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: A tragic tale about a young girl who gets married and has five kids. When she and her husband die, leaving all five kids behind to fend for themselves, the eldest child is forced to be sold into prostitution to feed the other four.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: The film is about a Chinese martial arts school finds itself outclassed by their rivals, they hire elite ninja from Japan to destroy the school. The lone survivor of the massacre learns the secrets of ninjutsu and seeks revenge against the ninja.

programme.title: Pursuit
programme.desc: This movie tells the tale of Lin Chong, the Sung Dynasty's Chief Army Instructor who is framed by a corrupt official and has to embark on an exile fraught with danger. Helped by a monk, Lin Chong is finally able to take revenge.

programme.title: Dirty Ho
programme.desc: Master Wang, who is actually the 11th prince, poses as an antique connoisseur to hide his true identity. When he meets Dirty Ho, a witty con artist, Wang knows he has found the right man to help him untangle a royal succession plot...

programme.title: Passing Flickers
programme.desc: This film is an amusing insider's look at the Hong Kong film industry and is based on Director Li Han Hsiang's popular newspaper column recounting his work at Shaw Brothers. The collection of some of his funniest and most surreal film musings of the era, filled with behind-the-scene asides, this is a must-see for any Hong Kong cinema aficionado!

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 3
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 19
programme.desc: Ji Xing (Tan Song Yun), refuses to endure the stifling corporate grind, she quits her job to embark on a challenging entrepreneurial journey and eventually secures the investment of Han Ting (Xu Kai). Together, they advance in the medical and health industry.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 221
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 10
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 14
programme.desc: Oh Woo-ri has vowed to remain a virgin until she marries and has avoided romantic relationships to maintain her chastity. However, during a routine medical exam, a terrible mix-up occurs, resulting in accidental artificial insemination.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 470
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 3
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 35
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 4
programme.desc: The story follows two people who found Muay Thai in their ordinary lives and begin to understand the value of life. After going through countless blows, injuries, self-doubts and other ups and downs, they finally achieved their own dreams!

programme.desc: Wang Han, along with Shen Mengchen and Zoelly Wu, explores Hunan's diverse culinary landscape, showcasing 14 cities' unique flavors and soulful local stories.

programme.title: James’ Going Places - EP 90
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 97
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 80
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 97
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.title: Fish Flew Away
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] When Mr. Zhong dies, he leaves behind two women, ex-wife Li Yu and current wife Shen Qing, and one small problem, a courtyard both can claim. Forced together, their clash becomes an unexpected journey of understanding.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 105
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 1
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 35
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 36
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 81
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 7
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 901-950) VVD Mandarin - EP 903
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Blue Moment - EP 7
programme.desc: This gripping drama centers on the looming threats of massive meteorological disasters and their impact on human lives. It follows the unwavering dedication of a Special Disaster Management team who armed with expertise and courage, risk everything on the front lines to save lives.

programme.title: Generation to Generation - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The series follows Cai Zhao (Bao Shangen), a calm and collected girl, and Mu Qingyan (Zhou Yiran), a decisive young master. While resolving historical conflicts together between different martial arts factions they also fall in love.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2231
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin collapses. Lam Ching hosts the press conference by herself and declares she won’t resign as trust executor. Meanwhile, Yau-wai incites craftsmen to collectively resign. Under the guidance of Ko Sham, Lam Ching uses kindness and coercion to negotiate with the employees.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2231
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 19
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 49
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Blue Moment - EP 8
programme.desc: This gripping drama centers on the looming threats of massive meteorological disasters and their impact on human lives. It follows the unwavering dedication of a Special Disaster Management team who armed with expertise and courage, risk everything on the front lines to save lives.

programme.title: Generation to Generation - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The series follows Cai Zhao (Bao Shangen), a calm and collected girl, and Mu Qingyan (Zhou Yiran), a decisive young master. While resolving historical conflicts together between different martial arts factions they also fall in love.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2232
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] In despair, Ka-yan recalls how she was bullied because of her ugly appearance, and she eventually married some rich guy as Sister Mary gave her a makeover. But from then on, she has been controlled and blackmailed by Sister Mary. Ko Sham uses Sister Mary’s unspeakable secret to counter blackmail her, helping Ka-yan resolve the blackmail crisis.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: The Last Immortal - EP 5
programme.desc: The story tells the story of Gu Jin, the son of the true god, and Ayin, the water-condensing beast, who work together to save the people of the three realms.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 19
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 20
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin tracks down Shek Wai’s old love Chiu Lai, who tells him a mysterious guy visited Shek Wai’s home recently. Chiu-kwan decides to sue Yeung-tin with the aim of revoking the trust. Ko Sham slyly makes the top legal counsels in the city refuse to represent Chiu-kwan. Siu-chuen questions Ko Sham about this.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen is unhappy about the prospect of Lam Ching becoming vice chairman, so she takes her to some road on the hill where she slaps and insults her. Family members react strongly to Yeung-tin’s decision to promote Lam Ching, and Wun-chau dissuades them.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 13
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Faced with the unanimous opposition of the directors, Yeung-tin boldly puts forward a proposal. He threatens to resign if Lam Ching’s appointment is not approved. As soon as the meeting is concluded, Wai-leung and his chums covertly tell the media about the inside story of the Fongs’ mother and son legal battle, causing Fong International share price to go south.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin collapses. Lam Ching hosts the press conference by herself and declares she won’t resign as trust executor. Meanwhile, Yau-wai incites craftsmen to collectively resign. Under the guidance of Ko Sham, Lam Ching uses kindness and coercion to negotiate with the employees.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] In despair, Ka-yan recalls how she was bullied because of her ugly appearance, and she eventually married some rich guy as Sister Mary gave her a makeover. programme.title: The Scarecrow - EP 1
programme.desc: Kang Tae Ju (Park Hae Soo), a former ace detective demoted to his hometown of Gangseong. He sees a serial murder case as an opportunity to restore his reputation, but clashes with prosecutor Cha Si Young (Lee Hee Joon), a bitter rival from his school days.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 10
programme.desc: Kim Eun invites Ho-young for a family dinner at her home. At her wits’ end, Prosecutor Kang reveals the truth to Ji-young. Can Pan-ho stop Ho-young in time, before it is too late?

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.
